problem_statement: Heuristic text-to-hinge derivation can produce ungrounded safe-harbor anchors that downstream hardened layers then carry faithfully.
contract_boundary: TextInput -> HingeObject / derivation record, including tightened live pass/fail criteria at the derivation seam without changing HingeObject shape or downstream contracts.
success_condition: Safe-harbor disclaimers are independently grounded or fail closed using the existing HingeObject schema and the existing downstream contracts.
out_of_scope: changing the R1 MutationDeclaration wire format
